WTT sffc yRPii T^t ^Trnft, 3Fqf?[ :-- "(iii) ^smrsi^JTR^, #f^ ^ R F T (TT^T *T*TT)" i [W .¥. 19014/66/1 3-TT?RM-IV] 3TTF# STJTTT, t^W *rf^T ffrrn:— ^ srfsrgjsnT -mm % <MH3, SRTOKW, STRT II, ws 3, ^ro^ (ii) t WTM. 89(ST), rrrft^ 13 wmf\, 2014 STCT ^PTf§RT # ^ # 3ftr cTW^TT^ ^JM. 605(3T), cTTft^ 28 H J ^ O , 2014 3lk SFrr.STT. 2008(3T), m f t ^ 7 3THW, 2014 ?0TT ^ftfsr^ # ^rf «ft I 865GI/2017 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(H)] MINISTRY OF SOCIAL JUSTICE AND EMPOWERMENT (Department of Social Justice and Empowerment) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th February, 2017 S.O. 476(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 29 of the Prohibition of Employment as Manual Scavengers and their Rehabilitation Act, 2013 (25 of 2013), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment, Department of Social Justice and Empowerment, dated the 13th January, 2014, namely vide number S.O. 89(E), dated the 13th January, 2014 published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-H, Section 3, Sub-section (ii):— In the said notification, in paragraph B, under the heading 'In pursuance of clause (f) of sub-section (2) of section 29 of the Act',:— (a) For item number (i) and the entry relating thereto, the following item number and entry shall be substituted, namely:— "(i) Shri Bhola Singh, Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha)"; (b) For item number (iii) and the entry relating thereto, the following item number and entry shall be substituted, namely:— "(iii) Shri Amar Shankar Sable, Member of Parliament (Rajya Sabha)" [F.No. 19014/66/13-SCD-1V] AINDRI ANURAG, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part 11, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), vide number S.O. 89 (E), dated the 13lh January, 2014 and subsequently amended vide number S.O. 605 (E), dated the 28* February, 2014 and number S.O. 2008(E), dated the 7,h August, 2014. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
